description_long: This object is a modern delivery scooter equipped for urban package transport. The scooter features a streamlined black and white body with a red accent on the seat, and a large, orange, box-shaped delivery container mounted securely on the rear rack. The delivery box is branded with 'XVR' and additional text, and appears to be made of rigid plastic or composite material, designed for secure transport of goods. The scooter has a transparent windscreen, rearview mirrors, and visible dashboard controls, indicating it is ready for road use. The wheels are solid with visible treads, and the overall build suggests durability and efficiency for city deliveries. The branding and box design imply affiliation with a professional delivery service.
description: A modern black and white delivery scooter with a large orange branded box mounted on the rear, designed for urban package transport.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the orange delivery box with branding, rear wheel, and taillight.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full scooter profile, delivery box, seat, and windscreen.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the windscreen, handlebars, mirrors, and headlight.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the delivery box branding, scooter body, and exhaust.
attribute_delivery_bag_or_box: Large, rigid, orange delivery box mounted on the rear rack, cubic in shape, with visible branding and a top flap.
attribute_company_logo_or_branding: Yes, 'XVR' logo and additional branding text are visible on the delivery box.
